# HOOK
a $15M ARR founder just told me: "AI carousels all look the same."

# RECEIPT
exact quote, dropped in our group chat last tuesday: "every AI carousel i scroll past has the same gradient background. i can spot them in 2 seconds."

# BREAKDOWN
he's right. 80% of generated carousels use one of three gradient palettes. the model defaults to safe color choices because they look "designed". safe is detectable.

# CONTEXT
brand visual systems exist for this exact reason. when every operator runs the same default style, audiences pattern-match the output as machine-made.

# CTA
comment GENERATOR and i'll send you the brand-aware kit that fixed this for our clients.
